debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN

proof:
(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B, Set.mem_ite_univ_right, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      intro h
      split_ifs at h with heq
      · rcases h with rfl | rfl
        · exact hx rfl
        · exact hy rfl
      · exact D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN'))
failed_attempts:
(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, not_or]
        exact ⟨hx, hy⟩
      · simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        intro hbot
        exact D.not_bot_mem (hbot ▸ hN'))

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h

        exact ⟨hx, hy⟩
      · simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
        exact fun h' => D.not_bot_mem' (h' ▸ hN'))
